name: GT Truck Racer
description: GT Truck Racer is an exciting truck driving game where you experience realistic driving across different cities and weather conditions. Take control of powerful trucks, navigate challenging roads, and avoid obstacles to reach your destination safely. Enjoy smooth controls, immersive environments, and dynamic gameplay that keeps you engaged. Test your driving skills, complete missions, and become the ultimate truck racer on every road you conquer
